kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

test.name: CT05 - Deve permitir salvar rotina com pelo menos um exercicio (T17)

kw.name: Dado que o administrador acessa a tela de nova rotina
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: E informa o nome da rotina
Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Treino Minimo' into text field 'id=nomeRotina'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: E informa a duracao total da rotina
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: E seleciona o primeiro exercicio da lista
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Quando solicitar o salvamento da rotina
Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Entao o sistema deve redirecionar para a listagem
Wait Until Location Is
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL is ``expected``.

test.name: CT06 - Deve reter o salvamento se nenhum exercicio for selecionado (T18)

kw.name: Dado que o administrador acessa a tela de nova rotina
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: E informa o nome da rotina
Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Treino Vazio' into text field 'id=nomeRotina'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: E informa a duracao total da rotina
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Quando solicitar o salvamento da rotina
Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Entao a interface deve mostrar o alerta de erro "Uma rotina precisa ter pelo menos um exercício vinculado"
kw.source_name: Entao a interface deve mostrar o alerta de erro "${mensagem}"

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Location Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL is exactly ``url``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
